ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = FALSE, ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Cancelled"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Cancelled")),
OR( ISBLANK( Cancellation_Date_Requested__c), ISBLANK( Cancellation_Date_Effective__c), ISBLANK( Cancellation_Amount__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
Please populate fields:
Cancellation Date Requested Cancellation Date Effective Cancellation Amount
